paragraphs: Fresh journal. Blank and crisp. I didn’t quite finish the last one, but feels like I need a new one for the new year. I’m on the tram going home. Moving home.  Odd how easily the word Home comes to mind.
My parents’ house. I haven’t lived there for over 10 years. Always visited at least spring and Christmas…but we all skipped last Christmas. Moving back home.
I keep deliberating in my head. Should I have applied to that job in Helsinki?  I’ve decided and surely regret doesn’t help.
This project is modest, but doing work in my hometown means a lot to me. Plus I’ll actually work 32 hours a week, like normal people do. Yes. Decided.
The tram has crossed the Golden Gate and I see Mt Tam in the distance. It does feel like home.
